evidence: Over Three Decades of Roofing Excellence

service_list.name: Roof Inspections
service_list.brief: Comprehensive roof inspections with detailed written reports for pre-purchase, insurance, or annual maintenance assessments.

service_list.name: Leak Detection
service_list.brief: Expert leak diagnosis using proven techniques to trace water ingress to its source and provide lasting waterproofing solutions.

service_list.name: Roof Repairs
service_list.brief: Repairs for broken, cracked, or displaced tiles that identify the root cause and fix it properly.

service_list.name: Roof Restoration
service_list.brief: Full roof restoration including cleaning, re-bedding, re-pointing, and resealing to extend the life of an existing roof.

service_list.name: Roof Extensions
service_list.brief: Professional roof extensions and additions matched to the existing roof using quality materials and expert craftsmanship.

service_list.name: Tile Clip Replacement
service_list.brief: Professional replacement of tile fixing clips to support roof stability, safety, and compliance with current standards.

service_list.name: Valley Cleaning & Sealing
service_list.brief: Valley cleaning, debris removal, and seal installation to help prevent water pooling, leaks, and structural damage.

service_list.name: Insurance Reports
service_list.brief: Insurance claim documentation and reports for damage assessment, trusted by insurance builders across the Gold Coast.

key_messaging: Trusted by homeowners, insurance builders, and real estate agents
Competitive pricing with no hidden fees

options.h1: Gold Coast Roof Tiling Specialists Since 1992
options.subhead: Licensed roof tiling, leak detection, inspections, repairs, restorations and tile supplies trusted by homeowners, real estate agents and insurance builders.

options.h1: Fix Roof Leaks Properly, Not Temporarily
options.subhead: GC Roof Tiling Solutions finds the source of water ingress and delivers lasting tile repairs, reports and restoration work across the Gold Coast.

options.h1: Licensed Roof Tile Repairs, Reports & Restorations
options.subhead: From broken tiles and valley sealing to insurance documentation and full roof restoration, get experienced local roofers who show up and do the work themselves.

items.name: Roof Inspections
items.description: Detailed roof inspections with written reports, ideal for buyers, insurers, property managers and homeowners planning preventative maintenance.

items.name: Leak Detection
items.description: Trace leaks to the true source and resolve water ingress with practical repairs designed to hold up through Gold Coast weather.

items.name: Roof Repairs
items.description: Repair cracked, broken or shifted roof tiles with careful fault-finding so the underlying issue is fixed, not just covered over.

items.name: Roof Restoration
items.description: Refresh and extend the life of an existing tiled roof with cleaning, re-bedding, re-pointing and resealing.

items.name: Roof Extensions
items.description: Match new roof extensions and additions into the existing tiled roof with consistent materials, finish and workmanship.

items.name: Tile Clip Replacement
items.description: Replace worn or non-compliant tile fixing clips to improve roof stability, safety and current-standard compliance.

items.name: Valley Cleaning & Sealing
items.description: Clear debris and install valley seals to reduce water pooling, prevent leaks and protect the roof structure over time.

items.name: Insurance Reports
items.description: Provide detailed damage documentation and reporting to support insurance assessment and repair decisions.

pages.description: GC Roof Tiling Solutions provides licensed roof inspections, leak detection, tile repairs, restorations, valley sealing, insurance reports and roof tile supplies across the Gold Coast.

items: Trusted by insurance builders and real estate agents
Locally owned and operated on the Gold Coast

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the established local trust signals: GC Roof Tiling Solutions has a strong specialist position, clear Gold Coast service area, long operating history since 1992, QBCC licence details, insurance cover, real project imagery, and practical roofing services. Improve the redesign by making the primary domain consistent, surfacing contact options clearly, replacing placeholder counters, expanding proof with testimonials or case studies if available, and structuring services around urgent homeowner needs such as leaks, inspections and insurance reports. The redesign matters because roof repairs are high-trust, high-urgency decisions; the site should quickly prove licensing, experience, responsiveness and workmanship so customers feel confident calling before water damage gets worse.

ready_to_build_concerns: Only 1 page was crawled, so Services, About, Gallery, Supplies, Resources and Contact content should be verified before final build.
Navigation URLs point to gcrooftiling-hw9svbez.manus.space rather than the customer domain gcrooftilingsolutions.com.au.
Address is missing state and postcode in the provided scrape.
No owner name, testimonials, team member details or ABN were found in the provided scrape.
Homepage counters appear as 0+ and 0%, which should be corrected or removed.
Booking workflow should be clarified because the site lists an AI bookings line and an office line.
